project.title: Real Estate Lead Generation Landing Page
project.description: A high-converting, single-page web platform designed to showcase premium property listings, capture qualified buyer and seller leads, and present agency credentials.
project.objective: To capture high-intent real estate leads by providing seamless property search, detailed listings, and robust contact and viewing request workflows.
successCriteria: Demonstrate a page load speed under 2 seconds on mobile and desktop
Achieve lead conversion rate exceeding 5% of unique visitors
Ensure 100% responsive display across all standard mobile and desktop viewport sizes

userRoles.name: Anonymous Visitor
userRoles.description: An unauthenticated user looking to buy, sell, or rent a property.
responsibilities: Search and filter listings by location, price, and type
Submit inquiry forms for specific properties or general consultation

userRoles.name: Real Estate Agent / Administrator
userRoles.description: The administrative user who receives leads and manages the landing page content.
responsibilities: Follow up with prospective clients captured by the landing page

functionalRequirements.title: Hero Section & Lead Capture
functionalRequirements.description: The platform must present an engaging hero section with an immediate search/filter input and a primary CTA leading to a contact form.
acceptanceCriteria: The primary contact form is visible above the fold or accessible via a sticky navigation button.
Form submission triggers a secure POST request to the lead storage or dispatch system.

functionalRequirements.title: Property Catalog and Filter
functionalRequirements.description: The platform must display a grid of featured properties with dynamic filtering by price, type, location, and bedroom count.
acceptanceCriteria: Filtering options apply instantly without requiring a full page reload.
Each listing shows key details: price, location, bedrooms, bathrooms, and square footage.

functionalRequirements.title: Property Detail Modal
functionalRequirements.description: The platform must allow visitors to click on any listing to view an expanded view with an image gallery, extended description, and a dedicated inquiry form.
acceptanceCriteria: The modal displays a functional image slider or gallery.
The dedicated modal form automatically associates the inquiry with the specific property ID.

functionalRequirements.title: Agent/Broker Profile Section
functionalRequirements.description: The page must present profile cards for key agents with links to direct contact details (phone, email, WhatsApp).
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking agent phone/email buttons triggers device-native dialer or email client.

performance: Page load speed must score above 90 on Google PageSpeed Insights.
All static assets and listing images must be lazily loaded and optimized.
scalability: The landing page must handle traffic spikes up to 10,000 concurrent visitors without degradation.
security: All form inputs must be sanitized to prevent SQL Injection and XSS attacks.
HTTPS must be enforced across all connections.
accessibility: Ensure compliance with WCAG 2.1 Level AA standards, including color contrast and screen reader accessibility.
reliability: The static front-end hosting must guarantee 99.9% uptime.
maintainability: The application must use a clean component-based design allowing easy updates to listings.
responsiveness: Layout must adapt smoothly to mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports.
seo: Incorporate JSON-LD schema markup for local business and real estate listings.
Optimized meta tags must be dynamically set for social sharing and search engines.

core.name: Dynamic Property Search Grid
core.description: An interactive search and filter grid showcasing active properties with live state updates.

core.name: Multi-Purpose Lead Capture Form
core.description: A validation-secured form enabling visitors to request property viewings or general consultations.

core.name: Agent Biography & Trust Badges
core.description: A curated area highlighting customer testimonials, license info, and agent credentials.

optional.name: Interactive Neighborhood Map
optional.description: A map showing property locations and nearby amenities.

optional.name: Automated WhatsApp Redirection
optional.description: A floating widget initiating instant chat with an active broker.

future.name: AI-Powered Home Valuation Estimator
future.description: An interactive tool allowing home sellers to get instant, automatic property estimates.

future.name: Virtual 3D Tour Embeds
future.description: Direct hosting or embedding of 3D walkthroughs from external providers inside property modals.

userStories.story: I want to filter properties by price and location
userStories.benefit: so I can quickly find homes that fit my budget and preferred neighborhood without scrolling endlessly.

userStories.story: I want to submit an inquiry directly through a property's details
userStories.benefit: so that the agent knows exactly which home I am interested in when they contact me.

userStories.story: I want to receive lead submissions directly to my email or CRM
userStories.benefit: so I can respond to hot prospects immediately and increase conversions.

workflows.name: Lead Form Submission Workflow
workflows.description: The path a user takes when inquiring about a property or requesting a callback.
workflows.trigger: User clicks the 'Submit Inquiry' button on any form.
steps: Validate input parameters (email format, telephone, required name).
Display a visual loading state to prevent double submission.
Dispatch lead metadata to the notification service/database.
Render a confirmation/success state on screen to the visitor.
workflows.outcome: The lead data is stored, the agent receives an email alert, and the user receives confirmation of their request.

businessRules.title: Lead Distribution
businessRules.description: All captured leads must trigger an email notification within 60 seconds to ensure prompt agent follow-up.

businessRules.title: GDPR and Privacy Compliance
businessRules.description: Every form must include an explicit checkbox requiring consent to be contacted before submission is allowed.

rules: Must conform to standard RFC 5322 email format.
Field is mandatory if a phone number is not provided.
Must match standard global or local telephone formats.
Must contain only numbers, spaces, or leading '+'.

integrations.name: Google Maps API
integrations.purpose: Display exact or general property geographic locations.

integrations.name: SendGrid / SMTP
integrations.purpose: Send automated real-time email notifications to agents upon lead form submissions.

business: Must adhere strictly to Fair Housing guidelines and local real estate advertising regulations.
technical: The landing page must require no complex database setup for viewing listings; properties can be loaded from a static JSON data file to maximize speed.
operational: Must be hosted on a CDN to guarantee low-latency loading globally.

risks.title: Large Image Payload
risks.description: High-quality property images can slow down mobile load times.
risks.mitigation: Enforce auto-optimization using Next-generation image formats (WebP/AVIF) and dynamic responsive sizing.

included: Property search and filtering by price and location
Contact and viewing request form with validation
excluded: Online payments or deposit booking workflows
